title: postloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /login with valid username and password returns 200 with correct access_token, token_type, username, and email.

title: postloginwithinvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /login with invalid username or password returns 400 with error message 'Username atau password salah'.

title: postregisterwithnewuser
description: Verify that POST /register with a new unique username and email returns 200 with UserResponse.

title: postregisterwithduplicateuser
description: Verify that POST /register with an existing username or email returns 400 with error message 'Email atau username sudah terdaftar'.

title: getuserprofileexistinguser
description: Verify that GET /users/{username} with an existing username returns 200 with UserResponse.

title: getuserprofilenonexistentuser
description: Verify that GET /users/{username} with a non-existent username returns 404 with error message 'User tidak ditemukan'.

title: getproductslist
description: Verify that GET /products returns 200 with a list of ProductResponse objects (empty list if no products).

title: postproductswithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /products with valid product data including SKUs and colors returns 200 with ProductResponse.

title: postproductswithinvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /products with missing required fields or duplicate SKU data returns 400 or 500 indicating validation or duplicate error.

title: getcartforusercreatesifmissing
description: Verify that GET /cart?username={username} returns 200 with CartResponse and creates a cart automatically if missing.
